monitor_the_situation.title: Iran Launches Ballistic Missiles at US Targets in Middle East

— S4 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 3h ago. Iran launched various ballistic missiles, including Ghadr, Emad, Kheibar-Shekan, Fateh-110, and Zulfiqar, towards US targets in the Middle East, escalating tensions.
